{{Quote|Heads up, spacers! Skyspeeders coming up on your left!|Han Solo|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 8">[[Star Wars (1977) 8|''Star Wars'' (1977) 8]]</ref>}}
The '''Peregrine-340 airspeeder''' was a model from [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech Repulsor Company]]. The [[Cloud-Riders/Legends|Cloud-Riders]] stripped down Peregrine-340s and attached the [[Engine/Legends|thrusters]] of [[Nebulon-Q Swoop Racer|Nebulon-Q]] [[Swoop/Legends|swoops]] to create their [[skyspeeder]]s.

{{Veh-stub}}

*[[Star Wars (1977) 10|''Star Wars'' (1977) 10]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 10}}
